questions.prompt: Which attribute shows the default browser playback controls?
questions.explanation: controls is a boolean attribute — its presence adds the play/pause UI.

options: So the browser can pick a supported codec/format
questions.explanation: Browsers try sources in order and pick the first they can play (e.g. WebM then MP4).

questions.prompt: Add controls to this video and provide fallback text.
questions.explanation: Text between <video>...</video> shows only in browsers that can't play video.
